title: How to calculate the number of days between two dates
task: Find how many days (or months/years) fall between a start date and an end date.

excel.note: Days. Use "m" for whole months, "y" for years. Or simply =B2-A2 for days.

explanation: DATEDIF(start, end, unit) returns the difference in the chosen unit: "d" days, "m" months, "y" years. Jan 1 to Mar 1 2024 (a leap year) is 31 + 29 = 60 days. For plain days you can also just subtract: =end-start.
